changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.comment: Backfill inventory ownership from linked notebook/project metadata only when the notebook resolves to exactly one department. Ambiguous legacy rows are intentionally left unchanged for admin cleanup.
changeSet.sql: WITH resolved_departments AS ( SELECT i.id AS item_id, nd.test_section_id AS department_id FROM clinlims.inventory_item i JOIN clinlims.notebook nb ON ( (TRIM(i.project_name) ~ '^[0-9]+$' AND nb.id = CAST(TRIM(i.project_name) AS INTEGER)) OR (TRIM(i.project_name) !~ '^[0-9]+$' AND LOWER(TRIM(nb.title)) = LOWER(TRIM(i.project_name))) ) JOIN clinlims.notebook_departments nd ON nd.notebook_id = nb.id WHERE i.department_test_section_id IS NULL AND i.project_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(i.project_name) <> '' ), uniquely_resolved AS ( SELECT item_id, MIN(department_id) AS department_id FROM resolved_departments GROUP BY item_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT department_id) = 1 ) UPDATE clinlims.inventory_item i SET department_test_section_id = ur.department_id FROM uniquely_resolved ur WHERE i.id = ur.item_id AND i.department_test_section_id IS NULL;
